g.text: WAHA sidecar (NOWEB engine, pinned by image digest - trust anchor)
marid-whatsapp - channel gateway (a client) - APPROVE token permission - presence typing + throttled edits - media
@marid/channel-client - subscribe - reconnect - re-fetch - poll self-bindings (reused unchanged)
Marid Gateway - @marid/gateway - channel: token - owns U bound SSE filter - INV-001 server-enforced

red = @marid/gateway (API/ingress); orange = marid-whatsapp (channel gateway, a client); amber = @marid/channel-client (shared, reused from PH-6); dark = session core (reused). WhatsApp reached ONLY via the WAHA sidecar, outbound-only (WS events in / HTTP out); no WhatsApp npm dep. APPROVE token parser runs first (RISK-021).
